steps: Seed cells on 24 well/plate. Density depends on the organism but should allow to screen for growth and death easily Seed the same density to test four or five different dilutions of each drug Seed enough wells to have 3X replicates for each condition Seeded cells for Abeoforma whisleri, Pirum gemata and Spaheroforma artica 100 cells/well 500 microliters of medium.
Add to each well the corresponding amount of drug. Following the amounts tested in our case for Abeoforma whisleri , Pirum gemmata, Sphaeroforma arctica %s %s

Spin down cells every 24 hours and refresh media with new antibiotic. Observe for up to a week. If effects on growth are suspected repeat experiment with the apropriate concentration of drug and count cells every 24 hours.
creator: Elena Casacuberta
